jsonLd.title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Swiggy
jsonLd.description:
Join the Swiggy family as a SEO Specialist in Lucknow. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Swiggy:
Swiggy is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Swiggy!
